## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`bun test` — zero failures)
- [ ] Lint passes (`bun run lint` — zero errors)
- [ ] Docs build (`cd apps/docs && bun run build` — clean)
- [ ] Changelog updated (`packages/*/CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`)
- [ ] New code has tests (>80% line coverage for new files)
- [ ] No `any` types without justification comment
